microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized system, standardizing ingestion workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that cut operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a fully scalable, self-service model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable model for continuous validation.
Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract.
Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven code generation** workflows, running technical demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 Azure service teams and saved 37 engineering hours monthly.

Shaped the product roadmap to include **intent-based YAML generation** by conducting 11+ structured user interviews with platform engineers to surface critical schema design and workflow integration gaps.
Improved data retrieval by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** system with rigorous metadata standards, cutting engineer lookup time by 83% across internal knowledge bases.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and reduced region launch timelines by 28% by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ engineering teams.
Ran technical discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built a roadmap to automate critical ingestion and deployment paths.
Built a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact infrastructure investments.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ warehouse stations.
Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% for robotics fleet systems.
Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process across distributed teams.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a redesigned CRM workflow.
Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing SEO, website UX, and Google Business presence.
Improved pricing models by analyzing **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks, delivering a profitability framework that informed leadership's cost and bid strategy.

tailoring_notes: Dropped the weakest bullet from microsoft_ft (AI restructuring detail merged into dedicated AI bullet) to hit exactly 5 bullets and save vertical space.
All roles held to min count to reclaim page space; every bullet tightened to 200-270 chars to ensure single-page fit.
JD vocabulary mirrored throughout: ingestion patterns, schema design, architecture, self-service, data pipelines, streaming, distributed systems, and POC/evaluation cycle language.
Bold targets are metrics and outcome nouns — recruiter eye-path lands on $14M, 94%, zero downtime, CI/CD pipelines — not generic adjectives.
Skills section front-loads columnar DB, SQL, streaming ingestion, and cloud infra to match ClickHouse's stated technical requirements before PM/process skills.
